bullets: Hook fallbacks for `CLAUDE_ANALYTICS_LESSONS_DB`, `CLAUDE_ANALYTICS_SESSIONS_DB`, and `CLAUDE_ANALYTICS_HOOKS_DB` now default to `$HOME/claude-analytics/<name>.db` instead of `$HOME/.claude/<name>.db`. `CLAUDE_ANALYTICS_HOOKS_DIR` was already at `$HOME/claude-analytics/hook-logs` and is unchanged. If you set these env vars explicitly, nothing changes. If you relied on the old fallback, your DBs will appear to be missing — set the env var (or move the files) to recover.
`relevant-toolkit-env_vars.md` and `getting-started.md` updated to show the new `~/claude-analytics/` defaults. `setup-toolkit` skill prompts now suggest the new paths.
